tool.name: Jasper
tool.shortDescription: AI copywriting tool for marketing teams and content creators
tool.description: Jasper is a popular AI writing assistant focused on marketing copy, blog posts, ad copy, and social media content. It offers brand voice customization, templates for common use cases, and integrations with SEO tools like Surfer SEO.
features: 50+ templates (blog posts, ads, emails, social media)
SEO mode with Surfer SEO integration
pros: Strong for marketing copy and ad creative
tool.bestFor: Marketing teams, content creators, bloggers, and ad copywriters

relatedTools.name: Rytr
relatedTools.shortDescription: Affordable AI writing assistant with unlimited usage on the $29/month plan
relatedTools.description: Rytr is a budget-friendly AI writing tool offering unlimited content generation at a fraction of the cost of competitors like Jasper. It provides 40+ templates, tone customization, and support for 30+ languages.
cons: Output quality can vary across content types
relatedTools.bestFor: Budget-conscious content creators, bloggers, and small businesses needing unlimited content

relatedTools.name: Copy.ai
relatedTools.shortDescription: AI copywriting platform with workflow automation for marketing teams
relatedTools.description: Copy.ai is an AI-powered copywriting tool designed for marketing teams. It offers templates for emails, social media, ad copy, and blog posts, plus workflow automation to streamline content creation processes.
relatedTools.bestFor: Marketing teams, agencies, and businesses needing workflow automation for content at scale
